task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., showing 'demo_provider' or 'Hillside Family Medicine').

task_completion.description: The agent opened the medical chart for patient Malka Hartmann.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's name 'Malka Hartmann' and DOB '1994-11-26' (or 'November 26, 1994') are visible in the active patient header or chart area.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the immunization section of the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Immunizations', 'Vaccines', or similar section/tab is open and active within the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct vaccine type, manufacturer, and lot number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields or a saved record show 'Td' (or 'TENIVAC') for the vaccine, 'Sanofi Pasteur' for the manufacturer, and 'TD2024-892' for the lot number.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct administration date for the vaccine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '11/15/2024', '2024-11-15', or 'November 15, 2024' is entered in the administration date field.

task_completion.description: The immunization record was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly added Td immunization appears in the list of the patient's recorded immunizations, or a clear success message confirming the addition is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI being used, not terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, SQL prompts, or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) are used to insert the data.

integrity.description: The record was created within the application's standard workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard forms and buttons of the NOSH EHR being used, rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Malka Hartmann (DOB: 1994-11-26, PID: 12). Provider: demo_provider (Hillside Family Medicine). Vaccine: Td (Tetanus and Diphtheria) - trade name TENIVAC. Manufacturer: Sanofi Pasteur. Lot number: TD2024-892. Administration date: November 15, 2024. NOSH ChartingSystem is a web-based EHR.
